This Saudi intervention has nothing to do with the article. There is no evidence of Saudi involvement in the planning and execution of the killing of Khamenei, only that they pressed the US to attack Iran. This information is best served in the article for the actual war, not for this page.

isn't necessary to repeat the name as the context is a logical input that the [[perceptual cue]] "assassination" (which matches a title word) provides a type of [[Gestalt_psychology#Law_of_closure|closure]] for the non/lack of direct information - this means: the sentence is shown for a reason that the "must exist" complete certainty of seeing evey word match the necessary subject relevancy in reading flow is presumed redundant/unnecessary/superfluous/not rationally expected

communication (was "vetoed") is not tantamount to an actual attempt - "Israel put forth" is infact individuals of the military and or government not a nation (which is the complete relevant populus who identify with the territory, those living in the place whether or not hey agree with their own government) - redetailed  excluding "injuries" in previous as this information isn't relevant to any of the current event
